name: IDEAL GROUP
description: No EU entity, no local VAT registrations, no legal hassle: we become the official seller to your European customers while you keep full control over brand and margins.

name: SupportYourApp
description: AI-powered customer support that scales. Reduce costs, improve CX and operate 24/7 with global teams. Custom CRM setups, dedicated phone systems, and fully compliant solutions (ISO 27001, PCI DSS, GDPR). Trusted by 250+ companies worldwide with over 16 years of experience

name: Gi BPO
description: Gi BPO Advanced Outsourcing is a prominent provider of Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) and Business Transformation Outsourcing (BTO) solutions, emphasizing customized services that enhance productivity and efficiency for clients. Their expertise in logistics, back-office operations, and field marketing demonstrates their capability as a reliable outsourcing partner, particularly in delivering value through tailored solutions and a results-oriented approach.

name: UCSA S.p.A.
description: The company specializes in comprehensive outsourcing services in logistics and supply chain management, offering solutions like order picking, packaging, inventory management, and real-time electronic tracking of goods. With a focus on flexibility and innovation, it aims to enhance customer efficiency by streamlining processes and adopting a fully digitized model.

name: ICOutsourcing
description: IC Outsourcing is a non-profit service provider that specializes in information management, offering services such as document archiving, data acquisition, and processing. Their expertise in managing and preserving paper archives supports businesses and public administration in their digital transition efforts.

name: Power Service Coop
description: L’Outsourcing is a strategic management model that allows companies to delegate various activities to third parties, enabling them to focus on their core business. This approach not only helps in reducing operational risks but also leads to cost savings and efficient service delivery.

name: OTS SpA
description: OTS is an IT service provider that offers a wide range of outsourcing services, including managed IT operations and support, which can help businesses meet their complex needs for digital innovation. With over a decade of experience in the Italian market, OTS integrates technology and management services to deliver effective solutions tailored to client objectives.

name: Elliot S.r.l.u.
description: Elliot is a prominent player in Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), offering comprehensive end-to-end outsourcing solutions that enhance operational efficiency and client relationships. Their expertise in tailored management consulting services underscores their commitment to driving innovation and value for clients through specialized outsourcing strategies.

name: Out4esses - Outsourcing for Office Processes S.r.l.
description: Out4esses specializes in outsourcing office processes, providing consulting services and offshoring solutions that emphasize high-quality design and operational efficiency. Their approach ensures guaranteed results through shared service levels and parameters, making them a key player in the outsourcing market.

name: POWER TEAM PROMOTION
description: The company specializes in outsourcing, offering intelligent solutions and management consulting through its organized distribution network in Europe.
